title: Nordic Adventure
description:
A Norse mythology–inspired mod that brings a great medieval vibe to your modpacks!

Created with MCreator!
body:
WARNING! THIS MOD IS IN ITS ALPHA STAGES. EXPECT BUGS AND UNFINISHED FEATURES.

# Nordic Adventure

A mod based off of Norse Mythology, great to put the vibe for Medieval Modpacks! made with MCreator!
![Longhouse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e188017b4d7eb876edde2aaab8ee9291fe0009e7_0.webp)

## 
- So, what is this mod about?

Nordic Adventure is a Norse-mythology–inspired mod. For now, it mainly adds buildings, but I plan to include new biomes, ores, and weapons in future updates.

-  Will you backport to older versions?

Maybe, although right now as of the time, no. Older verisons like 1.18.2 don't have blocks like deepslate bricks and its other variants available, which the mod uses, making it harder for me to backport.

- Modpack Permissions:

Yes, you can completely without any credit put my mod in your modpack, although credit is appreciated.
